item.title: And yes Caleb hammer is consistently pandering to the right wing
item.description:
And yes Caleb hammer is consistently pandering to the right wing . I will take no apologia of the guy that openly lied about my criticism of him in front of 3 million ppl.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: 1- not how it works 2- there is a ZERO percent chance this hurts small artists, yall don’t understand the doctrine you are slopp...
item.description:
1- not how it works 2- there is a ZERO percent chance this hurts small artists, yall don’t understand the doctrine you are sloppily repeating 3- even if it DID jeaprodize their IP why do you care? The lie about small artists (who are overwhelmingly hurt rather than helped by the corporate system) makes you identify with your oppressor rather than their victims. Get a life, and see a dentist to get that boot out ur mouth.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Idk abt yall, but im more an anti-imperial guy myself

item.title: LOL u don’t judge?
item.description:
LOL u don’t judge? Really? Bc we all are when ur releasing cutsy videos to recruit for a t*rrorist org

item.title: It is because instead of teaching you how to actually maintain a healthy relationship they are often teaching you what they thin...
item.description:
It is because instead of teaching you how to actually maintain a healthy relationship they are often teaching you what they think an ideal partner would want and of course those ideas are not yours#greenscreenvideo
